title: stelis dissimulans
intro: Stelis dissimulans, also known as the false thimble flower, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Stelis dissimulans are said to include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
